operating_ranges.evidence: valve orifice in standard units is sized that with a pressure difference between inlet and outlet fitting of typical 0.7 bar to 2.75 bar the specified full scale flow rate will be achieved
Typical Operating Range: 40…60% with new units under normal operating conditions. 0%: Valve is closed, 100%: Valve is fully opened
To open the shutoff valve pressurized air at 4,1 bar(g) to 8,2 bar(g) is required

degradation_mechanisms.evidence: Valve seat elastomer damaged - Check compatibility of process gas with seat material

degradation_mechanisms.rate_description: may change during operation even at the same flow rate
degradation_mechanisms.evidence: The value depends on many parameters: Pressure conditions, Temperature, Contamination, Age, May change during operation even at the same flow rate

fault_conditions.name: excessive_closed_conductance
fault_conditions.description: valve does not close properly allowing unwanted flow
fault_conditions.symptoms: flow when valve should be closed
fault_conditions.evidence: Excessive closed conductance - Inadequate valve preload or Valve seat elastomer damaged

fault_conditions.name: insufficient_full_flow
fault_conditions.description: unit does not achieve full flow rate
fault_conditions.evidence: Unit does not achieve full flow - Upstream pressure too low, Excessive valve preload, Valve seat disc damaged

fault_conditions.name: valve_malfunction
fault_conditions.description: valve sticking, clogged, contaminated, or corroded
fault_conditions.evidence: Controller does not function - Valve sticking, clogged, contaminated, corroded

maintenance_actions.name: valve_seat_replacement
maintenance_actions.evidence: Replace or change valve seat elastomer (return for service)

maintenance_actions.name: annual_recalibration
maintenance_actions.evidence: Recommended: Annual maintenance and recalibration at MKS service center if nothing else specified

assumptions.statement: Valve operates in normally closed configuration
assumptions.reason: Manual states 'Default State: Normally Closed (N.C.) when no power is applied'

assumptions.statement: Valve control is achieved through solenoid actuation
assumptions.reason: Manual describes 'solenoid driven valve' and 'Controlling flow is done by levitating the valve plug from the valve orifice'
